mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, provider_name, provider_type, adapter_code, logo, api_key, base_url, models, default_model, is_default, status, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_provider WHERE is_default = '1' AND status = '0' AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_provider WHERE is_default = '1' AND status = '0' AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 2
